device_name: Vantage Galan 3T, MRT-3020, V6.0 with AiCE Reconstruction Processing Unit for MR
intended_use: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the
intended_use_full: Vantage Galan 3T systems are indicated for use as a diagnostic imaging modality that produces cross-sectional transaxial, coronal, sagittal, and oblique images that display anatomic structures of the head or body. Additionally, this system is capable of non-contrast enhanced imaging, such as MRA.
ground_truth: Model observer study and comparison with commercially available predicate device performance
other_metrics: Model observer study for low contrast detectability; human observer study showing statistical preference of AiCE when compared to other performance filters; SNR and contrast performance metrics
